cannot select any tasks in the create/edit report modal
cross origin error when attempting to save a report: 
```
[Fast Refresh] rebuilding hot-reloader-client.js:162:25
Cross-Origin Request Blocked: The Same Origin Policy disallows reading the remote resource at http://localhost:8000/reports?offset=0&limit=20. (Reason: CORS header ‘Access-Control-Allow-Origin’ missing). Status code: 500.

    overrideMethod <anonymous code>:1

    error hydration-error-info.js:45
```
